headline: Is Willis Towers Watson Public Limited Company (WTW) One of the Best Affordable Stocks to Invest In for the Long Term?
summary: Willis Towers Watson Public Limited Company (NASDAQ:WTW) is among the 10 Best Affordable Stocks to Invest In for the Long Term. On February 26, Morgan Stanley lowered the firm’s price target on Willis Towers Watson Public Limited Company (NASDAQ:WTW) to $330 from $345 and maintained an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The revision follows […]
